# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

const DEFAULT_MODULES_ENV = "PLUGIN_MODULES";
const MAX_MODULES = 10;
const ALLOW_REMOTE = false;

type Json =
  | string
  | number
  | boolean
  | null
  | Json[]
  | { [key: string]: Json };

type LoadedModuleInfo = {
  specifier: string;
  resolved: string;
  ok: boolean;
  exports?: string[];
  error?: string;
};

function json(data: Json, init: ResponseInit = {}): Response {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  if (!headers.has("content-type")) {
    headers.set("content-type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
  }
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), {
    ...init,
    headers,
  });
}

function badRequest(message: string, extra: Record<string, Json> = {}): Response {
  return json({ error: message, ...extra }, { status: 400 });
}

function parseModuleList(value: string | null | undefined): string[] {
  if (!value) return [];
  return value
    .split(",")
    .map((s) => s.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);
}

function normalizeSpecifier(input: string): string {
  return input.trim();
}

function isSafeRelativeOrAbsolutePath(specifier: string): boolean {
  return specifier.startsWith("./") ||
    specifier.startsWith("../") ||
    specifier.startsWith("/") ||
    specifier.startsWith("file://");
}

function isAllowedRemoteSpecifier(specifier: string): boolean {
  if (!ALLOW_REMOTE) return false;
  return specifier.startsWith("https://") || specifier.startsWith("http://");
}

function validateSpecifier(specifier: string): string | null {
  if (!specifier) return "Empty module specifier";
  if (specifier.includes("\0")) return "Invalid module specifier";
  if (isSafeRelativeOrAbsolutePath(specifier)) return null;
  if (isAllowedRemoteSpecifier(specifier)) return null;
  return "Module specifier is not allowed";
}

function resolveSpecifier(specifier: string, requestUrl: string): string {
  if (specifier.startsWith("file://")) return specifier;
  if (specifier.startsWith("/")) {
    const url = new URL(requestUrl);
    return new URL(specifier, url.origin).href;
  }
  return new URL(specifier, requestUrl).href;
}

async function loadModule(
  specifier: string,
  requestUrl: string,
): Promise<LoadedModuleInfo> {
  const validationError = validateSpecifier(specifier);
  if (validationError) {
    return {
      specifier,
      resolved: specifier,
      ok: false,
      error: validationError,
    };
  }

  const resolved = resolveSpecifier(specifier, requestUrl);

  try {
    const mod = await import(resolved);
    return {
      specifier,
      resolved,
      ok: true,
      exports: Object.keys(mod).sort(),
    };
  } catch (error) {
    return {
      specifier,
      resolved,
      ok: false,
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    };
  }
}

function getRequestedModules(req: Request): { modules: string[]; source: string[] } {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  const queryModules = [
    ...parseModuleList(url.searchParams.get("module")),
    ...parseModuleList(url.searchParams.get("modules")),
  ];

  const envModules = parseModuleList(Deno.env.get(DEFAULT_MODULES_ENV));

  const modules = [...envModules, ...queryModules]
    .map(normalizeSpecifier)
    .filter(Boolean);

  const unique = [...new Set(modules)].slice(0, MAX_MODULES);

  const source: string[] = [];
  if (envModules.length) source.push(`env:${DEFAULT_MODULES_ENV}`);
  if (queryModules.length) source.push("query");

  return { modules: unique, source };
}

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  if (url.pathname === "/health") {
    return json({ ok: true });
  }

  const { modules, source } = getRequestedModules(req);

  if (modules.length === 0) {
    return badRequest(
      `No modules provided. Set ${DEFAULT_MODULES_ENV} or pass ?module=./path.ts,./other.ts`,
      { maxModules: MAX_MODULES },
    );
  }

  const results = await Promise.all(
    modules.map((specifier) => loadModule(specifier, req.url)),
  );

  const loaded = results.filter((r) => r.ok);
  const failed = results.filter((r) => !r.ok);

  return json({
    ok: failed.length === 0,
    runtime: "deno-deploy",
    sources: source,
    requested: modules,
    loadedCount: loaded.length,
    failedCount: failed.length,
    results,
  });
});
